{{Quote|The stupid idiots are mostly dead. Taking their million credit recruitment money with them, I might add.|Chief Administrator [[Vilim Disra]]|<ref name="Allegiance (novel)">[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]</ref>}}
The '''Bargleg swoop gang''' was a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] that was part of the [[BloodScar]], and was used to try to [[Skirmish on Drunost|hijack]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] weapons on [[Drunost]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]].

{{Stub}}
